spatie/laravel-permission.notes: Spatie Permission v5.11+ supports Laravel 10. v6.0 is recommended for full compatibility. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-permission:^6.0

livewire/livewire.notes: Livewire v2.12+ supports Laravel 10. Consider upgrading to Livewire v3 which was designed for Laravel 10+. Run: composer require livewire/livewire:^3.0

laravel/sanctum.notes: Sanctum v3.3+ required for Laravel 10. Run: composer require laravel/sanctum:^3.3

laravel/passport.notes: Passport v11.8+ required for Laravel 10 compatibility. Run: composer require laravel/passport:^11.8

laravel/horizon.notes: Horizon v5.15+ supports Laravel 10. No breaking changes for most applications.

laravel/telescope.notes: Telescope v4.14+ supports Laravel 10. Re-publish assets after upgrade: php artisan telescope:publish

laravel/cashier-stripe.notes: Cashier v14.12+ supports Laravel 10, v15 recommended. Run: composer require laravel/cashier:^15.0

barryvdh/laravel-debugbar.notes: Debugbar v3.8+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require barryvdh/laravel-debugbar:^3.8

spatie/laravel-medialibrary.notes: MediaLibrary v10.15+ supports Laravel 10, v11 recommended. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-medialibrary:^11.0

spatie/laravel-activitylog.notes: laravel-activitylog v4.7+ required for Laravel 10. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-activitylog:^4.7

spatie/laravel-backup.notes: laravel-backup v8.4+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-backup:^8.4

tymon/jwt-auth.notes: jwt-auth v2.0 required for Laravel 10. Significant config changes from v1.x. Run: composer require tymon/jwt-auth:^2.0

maatwebsite/excel.notes: Laravel Excel v3.1.48+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require maatwebsite/excel:^3.1.48

laravel/scout.notes: Scout v10 required for Laravel 10. Run: composer require laravel/scout:^10.0

laravel/socialite.notes: Socialite v5.6+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require laravel/socialite:^5.6

filament/filament.notes: Filament v3 is designed for Laravel 10+. Major rewrite from v2. Run: composer require filament/filament:^3.0

inertiajs/inertia-laravel.notes: Inertia Laravel v0.6.11+ supports Laravel 10. v1.0 recommended. Run: composer require inertiajs/inertia-laravel:^1.0

laravel/breeze.notes: Breeze v1.20+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require laravel/breeze:^1.20 --dev

laravel/jetstream.notes: Jetstream v3+ supports Laravel 10. v4 recommended with latest Livewire/Inertia. Run: composer require laravel/jetstream:^4.0

spatie/laravel-query-builder.notes: Query builder v5.5+ supports Laravel 10. Run: composer require spatie/laravel-query-builder:^5.5
